message:
fix(docker): bump Go version to 1.25.8 (gh#3502)

Dockerfile pinned GO_VERSION=1.25.6, but go.mod requires 1.25.8 and
beads@v0.63.3 also requires >=1.25.8, so `make build` failed with
"module requires go >= 1.25.8 (running go 1.25.6)".

files.patch:
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # docker build -t gastown:latest -f Dockerfile .
 FROM docker/sandbox-templates:claude-code
 
-ARG GO_VERSION=1.25.6
+ARG GO_VERSION=1.25.8
 
 USER root
